extensionDescription.message: Saves {image, video, audio, links, selection, page} in directories relative to the default download directory.

translationCredits.description: Credits for translations. Leave ​ for blank. Eg. sv translation by @username <email or url>, Real Name <contact>

genericUnknownError.description: A generic error message used as a fallback

contextMenuItemOptions.description: Title of context menu item that opens the options menu when clicked.

contextMenuExclusive.description: Name for menu item when in exclusive mode.

contextMenuRoot.description: Name for root context menu item.

contextMenuLastUsed.description: Placeholder title for last used option.

contextMenuContextMedia.description: Indicator that Save In is saving just media.

contextMenuContextMediaOrLink.description: Indicator that Save In is saving a media or link.

contextMenuContextSelection.description: Indicator that Save In is saving a selection.

contextMenuContextPage.description: Indicator that Save In is saving a page.

contextMenuShowDefaultFolder.description: Title of context menu item that opens the default downloads directory in the system file manager when clicked.

notificationSuccessTitle.description: Notification title for a successful download

notificationFailureTitle.description: Notification title for a failed download

notificationRuleMatchedTitle.description: Notification title for a rule match

notificationRuleMatchFailedExclusiveTitl.message: Save In: Failed to route or rename download
notificationRuleMatchFailedExclusiveTitl.description: Notification title for no rule matches when in exclusive mode

notificationRuleMatchFailedExclusiveMess.description: Notification title for no rule matches when in exclusive mode

ruleMissingMatcher.message: Rule needs at least one matcher clause
ruleMissingMatcher.description: Error message for missing matcher in rule

ruleCaptureMissingMatcher.message: Capture clause is not targeting a matcher
ruleCaptureMissingMatcher.description: Error message for capture targeting missing matcher

ruleMissingCapture.message: Rule needs a capture clause to use capture variables
ruleMissingCapture.description: Error message for missing capture clause in rule

ruleMultipleCapture.message: Rule can only have one capture clause
ruleMultipleCapture.description: Error message for multiple capture clauses in rule

ruleMissingInto.message: Rule needs at least one into clause
ruleMissingInto.description: Error message for missing into clause in rule

ruleExtraInto.message: Rule can only have one into clause
ruleExtraInto.description: Error message for multiple into clauses in rule

ruleUnknownMatcher.description: Error message for an unknown matcher

ruleInvalidRegex.description: Error message for a rule with invalid regex

ruleShadowed.message: Rule can never be reached because an earlier rule has the same or broader match
ruleShadowed.description: Warning for a routing rule shadowed by an earlier rule

ruleBadClause.description: Error message for lines in rule with syntax errors

rulePathInvalidCharacter.description: Error message for rules with invalid characters in path

rulePathStartsWithDot.description: Error message for paths in routing rules that start with invalid characters

tabstripMenuSelectedTab.description: Tabstrip context menu label for saving selected tab

tabstripMenuMultipleSelectedTab.description: Tabstrip context menu label for saving one or more highlighted tab

tabstripMenuSaveChildrenTabs.message: Save other tabs opened from this tab
tabstripMenuSaveChildrenTabs.description: Tabstrip context menu label for saving child tabs

tabstripMenuSaveRightTabs.message: Save all tabs to right including this
tabstripMenuSaveRightTabs.description: Tabstrip context menu label for saving tabs to the right (inclusive)

tabstripMenuSaveRightTabsMatched.message: Save all tabs to right including this (must match a route)
tabstripMenuSaveRightTabsMatched.description: Tabstrip context menu label for saving tabs to the right (inclusive) that match a route

o_sDownloads.description: o prefixes are for options page text, s prefix are for section/subsection titles

o_lContextMenuBehaviorHelp.message: Choose which Save In actions appear in context menus.

o_lAlsoAskWhen.message: Also ask where to save when:

o_lBrowserDownloadsHelp.message: Opt in to handling downloads started by web pages or the browser itself. Downloads started by Save In or another extension are excluded.

o_cTrackBrowserDownloads.message: Include ordinary browser downloads in Save In history

o_cTrackBrowserDownloadsHelp.message: Records matching downloads in Save In history without taking ownership of them. They are not retried and do not trigger Save In prompts or notifications.

o_cRouteBrowserDownloads.message: Use routing rules for all browser downloads

o_cRouteBrowserDownloadsHelp.message: Uses downloads.onDeterminingFilename when the browser implements it. Matching rules may rename or place ordinary browser downloads into subdirectories. Unmatched downloads are unchanged.

o_cRouteBrowserDownloadsFirefox.message: Experimentally reroute matching downloads on Firefox

o_cRouteBrowserDownloadsFirefoxHelp.message: Experimental and potentially disruptive. Firefox currently does not implement downloads.onDeterminingFilename, so Save In cancels the original and starts a replacement. This option will disappear automatically if Firefox adds the native API. POST downloads, expiring URLs, special request headers, and some authenticated downloads may fail.

o_cBrowserDownloadFilterHelp.message: Blank handles every ordinary browser download. Otherwise enter one WebExtension match pattern per line, such as *://*.example.com/* or https://example.com/files/*. The filter applies to history tracking and routing.

o_cBrowserDownloadExcludeFilterHelp.message: Enter one WebExtension match pattern per line. Exclusions override the matching URLs above and apply to both history tracking and routing.

o_lBrowserDownloadVariables.message: Browser downloads provide only the URL, proposed filename, current time, counter, UUID, and MIME variables. Page title, page URL, link text, selection, menu metadata, and key modifiers are unavailable.

o_lPageSourcesHelp.message: Browse images, video, audio, documents, and downloadable links found on the current page. Saved items use your normal routing and renaming rules.

o_lPageSourcesNetworkLimit.message: Some video players use temporary URLs or load media through scripts, so Save In may not detect every video. It can sometimes find streaming-video playlists (HLS/DASH), but these files only list the separate video pieces; saving one does not save the complete video.

o_cSourcePanelResourceHints.message: Look for streaming-video playlists (HLS/DASH; best effort)

o_cSourcePanelLinks.message: Include links, linked media, and PDF documents

o_lSourcePanelShortcutHelp.message: Use browser shortcut syntax, for example Ctrl+Shift+Y or Command+Shift+Y. The browser rejects reserved shortcuts.

o_lHistoryFilter.message: Filter by file, folder, type, or source

o_lMenuPreview.description: Heading for the live context-menu tree preview on the options page

o_lLiveVariables.description: Heading for the scrollable list of variables and their current values

o_lInsertFilter.message: Type to filter, Enter to insert

o_lRuleBuilder.description: Caption above the guided rule input on the options page

o_lRuleTemplates.description: Summary label for the built-in rule templates list

o_lGuideSymlink.message: Guide: Save outside the default downloads directory

o_lDirectoryInstructionSymlink.message: A symlink is needed to save outside the default download directory.

o_lAccessKeysInstruction.message: Set accesskeys for Save In menu items.

o_cLastUsedMenu.description: c prefixes are for controls (buttons, etc)

o_cPreferLinks.message: Save the link target instead of embedded media

o_cSaveText.message: Show an action for selected text

o_cSavePage.message: Show an action for the current page

o_cSavePageHelp.message: Saves the page document only; images, stylesheets, and other external files are not included.

o_cSaveTabstrip.message: Show Save In actions in the tab menu

o_cSaveTabstripHelp.message: Saves a tab, tab group, or tabs to right

o_cOpenDialogShift.message: Shift is held while choosing a menu item

o_cOpenDialogIfNoRulesMatch.message: Open a save file dialog if no rules match

o_cExclusiveMode.message: Exclusively use routing and renaming rules

o_cExclusiveModeHelp.message: Disables submenu for two-click downloads, saves relative to default downloads directory

o_cNotifyMatch.message: Show notification on a rule match

o_cNotifyCloseAfterHelp.message: 1s = 1000ms. Will not extend beyond OS/browser notification duration.

o_cSaveShortcutsTypeMacWebloc.description: Native macOS internet location shortcut format

o_cSaveShortcutsTabsInstead.message: Save tabs as shortcuts instead (from right-click tab)

o_cKeyboardShortcutNumbers.message: Add number key shortcuts to context submenu items

o_cKeyboardShortcutClickToHelp.message: Hold down Alt (default) and click images or media to save them in the last used directory or default download directory. Injects a script into pages to listen for click events. Not all variables are available when using this. Requires page refresh to take effect.

o_cHostPermissionMissing.message: Save in doesn't have access to page content. Click-to-save won't work until you grant access to all sites.

o_cKeyboardShortcutModifierHelp.message: Hold the selected modifiers while clicking the chosen mouse button. Choose None in both modifier fields to use the mouse button alone. Changes apply to existing pages.

o_cTruncatePath.message: Truncate path components to this many characters

o_cReplaceInvalidCharsWithHelp.message: Leave blank to delete. Invalid replacement characters are ignored.

o_cAppendMimeExtension.message: Add a file extension when the filename has none

o_cAppendMimeExtensionHelp.message: For extensionless or query-suffixed URLs, derive the extension from the server's Content-Type (via a HEAD request). Adds a small delay only when the name lacks one.

o_cFallbackFetch.message: Retry failed downloads in the background

o_cFallbackFetchHelp.message: When a download fails with a network or server error, retry it once by fetching in the background before reporting failure.

o_cFetchViaFetchAPIHelp.message: Fetches the file itself and hands the browser the result, instead of pointing the browser's downloader at the URL. Turn it on only where normal downloads fail — some servers block the browser's request or return an empty file. It's slower, and on Chrome the file is held in memory while saving, so avoid it for very large downloads.

o_cIncludeFetchCredentials.message: Use website sign-in cookies for extension requests

o_cIncludeFetchCredentialsHelp.message: Includes applicable cookies and browser-managed authentication in background Fetch and HEAD requests. Enable only for sites that require your signed-in session. Direct browser downloads manage their own cookies.

o_cContainerAuthPermission.message: Preserve Firefox Container authentication for direct downloads

o_cContainerAuthPermissionHelp.message: Optional Firefox permission. Selects the originating Container's cookie store without reading or storing cookie values. Fetch-through-extension requests cannot preserve a Container. Status:

o_cSetRefererHeader.message: Set the "Referer" header to the page URL when missing

o_cSetRefererHeaderHelp.message: Firefox only. Some sites (e.g. pixiv.net) reject downloads without an HTTP Referer header. For matching downloads, Firefox sends the page URL directly as the Referer. Leave it off unless a site needs it.

o_cSetRefererHeaderFilter.message: Set the Referer for these sites

o_cSetRefererHeaderFilterHelp.message: One match pattern per line, e.g. *://i.pximg.net/*. The Referer is only set for downloads whose URL matches one of these.

optionsUnsavedChanges.message: Discard your unsaved changes, or keep editing?
optionsUnsavedChanges.description: Dialog shown when leaving a tab with unsaved editor changes

optionsEditorUnsaved.description: Status shown beside Apply and Discard for a modified manual editor

o_lDirectoryDefinitionsHelp.message: One relative directory or menu instruction per line. Downloads save relative to the default download directory. Add // at the end for a comment; start with > to create nested submenus, using one > per level.

notificationLinkPreferred.description: Notification title when link was downloaded over a source

o_cPreferLinksFilterHelp.message: Enter one regular expression per line. Patterns are matched against the page URL.

o_cNotifyLinkPreferred.message: Show notification when a link was downloaded instead of the source

o_cCloseTabOnSave.message: Close each tab after it is saved

o_sGuideOutsideDownloadDirectory.message: Saving outside the default download directory

o_lManualEditorSaveHelp.message: Changes in this editor are saved when you select Apply.
